summary: Directory-split matching-improvement PR for src/melee/gr. The loaded evidence shows small C-shape, local-variable, field-offset, and expression rewrites across Ground/stage files, with decomp-dev reporting 3 new matches and 15 unmatched-item improvements for this slice. One review comment flags a gricemt assert-related hunk as a regression, but gricemt is not present in the loaded changed-files list.

key_files.role: Adjusted local declarations and expanded conditional assignments in grAnime_801C7C1C; bot reported score improvement.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/granime.c added 12 deleted 2
raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C adds manim/sdobj locals and replaces ternary initializers with explicit if/else assignments
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grAnime_801C7C1C +9 bytes, 97.16% to 98.05%

key_files.role: Adjusted bigblue GroundVars field use and introduced temporaries for call arguments; bot reported one new match and a major improvement.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c added 11 deleted 9
raw_diff: grBigBlue_801E6C60 changes gp->gv.bigblue.data[i].x8 to x4 and introduces left_x/right_x
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grBigBlue_801E8D64 as new match and grBigBlue_801E6C60 +125 bytes, 95.24% to 97.20%

text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grCastle_801CFBD4 +20 bytes, 95.19% to 96.33%

text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grCorneria_801E1348 +18 bytes, 97.62% to 99.02%, and grCorneria_801DED50 +1 byte

changed_files.jsonl: no gricemt entry in loaded changed-files list

what_changed: The PR was split from #2617 by directory/subsystem and scoped to src/melee/gr, according to the PR body.
Loaded changed-file metadata contains 12 changed files under src/melee/gr; the PR body also lists gricemt.c, creating a mismatch with the changed-files list.
decomp-dev reported +3188 matched-code bytes for this slice, 3 new matches, and 15 improvements in unmatched items.

Several edits are code-shape changes used for matching: declaration order changes, temporary locals for call arguments, explicit if/else assignments instead of ternaries, combined assignment-in-condition, pointer temporaries, and casted null comparisons.

Some edits affect recovered field or flag choices, including grBigBlue data x8 to x4 and grMuteCity xD0_flags.b6 to b1, but the slice does not include enough type-definition evidence to promote those as global path facts.

smart_moves.text: The PR was split by subsystem/path so matching changes in src/melee/gr were easier to review.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so the matching improvements are easier to review
human_pr_text: Scope src/melee/gr

smart_moves.text: The author included local check context and deferred authoritative scoring to per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting, which helps separate preliminary unsplit-branch score claims from slice-specific evidence.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Local Checks
human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is the authoritative slice score once it completes
text_corpus: decomp-dev report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: Where a loop's row/column roles were clear from function parameters and indexing, grgreens renamed generic loop variables to row and col, improving reviewability without inventing broad symbol meaning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreens_80214FA8 changes k/j to row/col and calls grGreens_80215358(gobj, col, row, ...)

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage matching, local declaration order and local lifetime can materially affect MWCC output; this PR repeatedly changes declaration placement and introduces or removes locals to improve function scores.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C adds manim/sdobj locals at top of function
raw_diff: grCorneria_801DED50 reorders grCn_Data* data declaration
raw_diff: grMuteCity_801F290C introduces lobj2 and j locals inside block
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists improvements for these functions

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing a boolean found flag with the loop counter's terminal value can be a useful matching shape when the source scans until a break and then tests whether the full range was exhausted.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_801FB0AC removes bool match, uses u32 i loop, and tests i == 0x13
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grInishie1_801FB0AC improvement

decomp_lessons.lesson: Introducing explicit temporaries for computed call arguments can improve matching when direct expressions in the call do not have the needed evaluation/storage shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlue_801E6C60 introduces left_x and right_x before grBigBlue_801E8B84 call
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grBigBlue_801E6C60 +125 bytes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Use recovered typed fields and union arms when available, but do not promote field offset corrections as global facts from a single diff without type-definition corroboration.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gp->gv.bigblue.data[i].x8 changed to x4
raw_diff: gp->gv.mutecity.xD0_flags.b6 changed to b1
decomp_standards: typed-fields-over-pointer-math
decomp_standards: conservative-naming

naming_conventions.name: row / col
naming_conventions.context: Used for grgreens 5-by-6 block grid traversal instead of generic k/j.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreens_80214FA8 for row = 0; row < 5; row++ and for col = 0; col < 6; col++

naming_conventions.name: left_x / right_x
naming_conventions.context: Local temporaries for left and right X bounds passed to grBigBlue_801E8B84.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlue_801E6C60 adds f32 left_x and right_x

naming_conventions.name: side
naming_conventions.context: Local cache of gp->gv.corneria.x11A before branch selection.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCorneria_801E1348 adds s32 side = gp->gv.corneria.x11A

naming_conventions.name: cb1_src / cb2_src
naming_conventions.context: Const pointer aliases for callback source arrays in grCastle_801CFBD4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CFBD4 adds const unkCastleCallback* cb1_src and const unkCastleCallback2* cb2_src

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration order and local lifetime steering
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C hoists manim/sdobj declarations
raw_diff: grCorneria_801DED50 moves data declaration after pos
raw_diff: grInishie1_801FAC58 changes order of Ground* declaration and GET_GROUND call
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Loaded evidence shows score improvements, but no objdiff excerpt is present for each local-lifetime edit.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Explicit if/else assignment instead of ternary initializer
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C replaces sj/mj ternary initializers with if/else assignments
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grAnime_801C7C1C improvement
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Useful local shape tactic; not a readability standard by itself.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserve or introduce stack/local pointer temporaries
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CFBD4 keeps PAD_STACK(12) and adds callback source pointers
raw_diff: Ground_801C466C adds Vec3* sp10p and passes sp10p to HSD_LObjSetPosition/Interest
raw_diff: grInishie2_801FD9EC assigns temp_vec before HSD_JObjGetTranslation
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: PAD_STACK and pointer-lifetime tactics need narrow verification under the loaded standards; PR evidence includes bot score report but not per-hunk objdiff details.

evidence_refs: raw_diff: grMuteCity_801F1A34 changes car_pos.x > -200.0f to -200.0f < car_pos.x
raw_diff: grMuteCity_801F1A34 changes pointer/integer null checks to (u32) field comparisons
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Evidence supports these as local matching edits, not a general style preference.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use loop counter terminal test instead of separate boolean flag
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_801FB0AC removes bool match and checks i == 0x13
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Grounded in one function; curator should avoid overgeneralizing.

review_feedback.comment: As mentioned on another PR, this is a regression.
evidence_refs: review_comments: src/melee/gr/gricemt.c discussion_r3374261835
review_comments: diff hunk shows removal line HSD_ASSERT(0x258, i<ICEMT_FIELD_MAX)
review_feedback.intake_note: The review comment concerns gricemt.c, which is listed in the PR body but absent from the loaded changed_files.jsonl. Treat this as real review evidence but incomplete file-change evidence.

follow_up_queries: grBigBlue_801E6C60 bigblue data x4 x8 field meaning
grMuteCity_801F1A34 xD0_flags b1 b6 car item matching

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed-file counts, state MERGED
human_pr_text: PR body scope, preliminary report, local checks, file list
changed_files.jsonl: 12 changed files with line counts
raw_diff: detailed hunks for several files but truncated before full grrcruise/grvenom/grzebes coverage

review_comments: one gricemt regression comment
notes: The raw diff loaded in the prompt is truncated, so grrcruise, grvenom, and grzebes have less direct hunk detail than earlier files.

The PR body lists gricemt.c and a review comment targets gricemt.c, but changed_files.jsonl and metadata changed_files do not include gricemt.c. This mismatch prevents a complete file-change summary for gricemt.
The PR body includes preliminary full-branch report numbers; the decomp-dev issue comment provides more slice-specific reporting and is preferred for per-PR score claims.
No per-hunk objdiff output is loaded, so tactics are recorded as matching tactics supported by bot score movement, not as individually proven accepted standards.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Loop counter terminal tests can replace separate found flags for match shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grInishie1_801FB0AC, the PR removed a separate bool match flag and tested whether the scan counter reached 0x13 after the loop. The bot reported a score improvement for the function. This is a local matching pattern to consider when a scan loop breaks on found status and otherwise needs an exhausted-range test.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_801FB0AC bool match removed and i == 0x13 used
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grInishie1_801FB0AC +10 bytes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Argument-bound temporaries can matter for MWCC shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grBigBlue_801E6C60, computed X bounds were split into left_x and right_x locals before calling grBigBlue_801E8B84, and the bot reported a sizable function improvement. This supports trying explicit temporaries for computed call arguments when direct expression calls do not match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: left_x/right_x introduced before grBigBlue_801E8B84
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists grBigBlue_801E6C60 +125 bytes

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr PR slice included stage GroundVars field-shape corrections
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2622 changed several stage-specific field accesses, including grBigBlue_801E6C60 using gp->gv.bigblue.data[i].x4 where x8 had been used, and grMuteCity_801F1A34 using gp->gv.mutecity.xD0_flags.b1 where b6 had been used. Curator should verify against current GroundVars definitions before recording any path fact.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlue_801E6C60 x8 to x4 changes
raw_diff: grMuteCity_801F1A34 xD0_flags.b6 to b1 change
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful type/field recovery evidence, but the PR slice alone does not include the owning type definitions or enough corroboration to accept globally.

source_update_candidates.title: Regression review note: assert cleanups can regress matching/source fidelity
source_update_candidates.text: A reviewer flagged a gricemt.c hunk involving HSD_ASSERT(0x258, i<ICEMT_FIELD_MAX) as a regression. Curator should inspect the related PR history before adding or refining any assert-specific standard.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan comment says this is a regression
review_comments: hunk shows removed HSD_ASSERT line
source_update_candidates.reason: Review feedback is explicit but context is incomplete and the file is absent from loaded changed-files metadata.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the preliminary full-branch score numbers as the authoritative PR-slice result; the PR body itself says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative once complete.
Do not accept gricemt.c as a normal changed file solely from the PR body; loaded changed-files metadata omits it even though review evidence exists.

Do not turn PAD_STACK, casted null comparisons, declaration-order steering, or pointer-temporary edits into global style rules from this PR alone; they are local matching tactics requiring narrow verifier evidence.
